title: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
abstract: AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨
abstract_zh: 快来看看这个叫 **AstrBot** 的小能手！写周报时再也不会被一堆数据困住，AstrBot帮你一键生成！调Bug时也不怕繁琐，它能快速定位问题，让你省心又省力。快来加入它的队伍吧，效率提升不止一点点哦~
